title: Lemi's Chickens
body:
A Resource Pack that overhauls the chicken model and texture, as well as adding variants between biomes. Currently, the majority of them are my own take on the chickens from Minecraft Earth.

It's still a work in progress, so expect new variants in the future.

### WARNING : This Resource Pack requires OPTIFINE in order to work correctly.

An alternative to OPTIFINE is using both [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures).



In case you wanna stay updated on my textures, consider following my Twitter (X) account: https://x.com/lemilemiIart.
